# Rindra Razafimandanona

I am a Full Stack .NET Developer based in Madagascar.

My main expertise includes:

- ASP.NET Core
- C#
- Blazor
- Angular
- SQL Server
- Entity Framework Core
- REST APIs
- Docker

I build:
- Enterprise business applications
- REST APIs
- Modern web applications
- Dashboard applications
- CRUD applications
- Portfolio websites

Programming Languages:
- C#
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- SQL

Frontend:
- Angular

Backend:
- ASP.NET Core

- SQL Server

Current Goal:
Seeking remote opportunities as a Full Stack .NET Developer while continuously improving my expertise in Angular, Docker, CI/CD, and cloud technologies.
